# ElicitationForm.ElicitationCompleteAction enumeration

How a client should react to an incoming completion notification (spec §20.6).

```csharp
public enum ElicitationCompleteAction
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ignore | `0` | An unknown or already-completed id ⇒ MUST ignore, take no action (R-20.6-d). |
| Complete | `1` | A pending id just completed ⇒ MAY auto-retry / update UI / continue (R-20.6-e). |
